MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Petitioner TAD NGUYEN (Tel: 650-766-7342) appearing in pro per;
Atty. J. JEFFREY MOJCHER, ESQ. (Tel: 916-274-5751) appearing from and for Respondent California Occupational Safety and Healthy Appeals Board;
Atty. CYNTHIA L. PEREZ, ESQ. (Tel: 510-286-7348) appearing from and for Real Party in Interest Division of Occupational Safety and Health.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

The matter is argued and submitted by the parties.

The Court takes RESPONDENT THE OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH APPEALS BOARD MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Petitioner TAD NGUYEN (Tel: 650-766-7342) appearing in pro per;
Atty. J. JEFFREY MOJCHER, ESQ. (Tel: 916-274-5751) appearing from and for Respondent California Occupational Safety and Healthy Appeals Board;
Atty. CYNTHIA L. PEREZ, ESQ. (Tel: 510-286-7348) appearing from and for Real Party in Interest Division of Occupational Safety and Health.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

The matter is discussed by the parties.

Real Party in Interest Division of Occupational Safety and Health WITHDRAWS its Joinder to California Occupational Safety and Health Appeals Board's Motion for Judgment or Alernatively Judgment on the Pleadings.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-02-2018 Continued To Apr-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tad Nguyen 650-766-7342 Petitioner in Pro Per.
J. Jeffrey Mojcher, Chief counsel 916-274-5751 from California Occupational Safety and Health Appeals Board for Respondent THE OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH APPEALS BOARD.
Cynthia Perez, StaffCounsel 510-286-7348 from Division of Occupational Safety and Health for Respondent Division of Occupational Safety and Health.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court inquires if Plainitff is aware of the tentative ruling posted. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT THE OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH APPEALS BOARD's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Continued to April 6, 2018 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff's Opposition due on 3/16/18. Responsive pleadings due on 3/2/18. No reply. Copies of Papers to Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
